sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n104262" key="to/nea" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τόνεα</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τά</gen>, festival of Hera at Samos, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1506.tlg001:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Menodot.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1</biblScope> </bibl> (better <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Τόναια,</foreign> as Kaibel).</entryFree>
